description_long: This object consists of four pieces of sushi, each with a rectangular shape and a visible cross-section showing rice, seaweed, and a colorful filling, topped with a layer of orange fish, likely salmon. The sushi pieces are arranged neatly on a flat, brown rectangular platform that resembles a serving board or tray. To the side, there are two brown chopsticks resting parallel to each other, and a small round black dish, possibly for soy sauce. The sushi pieces have a distinct marbled pattern on the fish topping, and the rice is wrapped in a thin layer of seaweed. The overall presentation is clean and organized, with the sushi and utensils placed for easy access. The visual style is stylized but clear, with each component easily identifiable.
description: Four pieces of salmon-topped sushi are arranged on a brown serving board with chopsticks and a small round dish. The sushi features visible rice, seaweed, and colorful fillings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sushi pieces, chopsticks, and round dish all clearly arranged on the brown board.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the marbled orange fish topping and the rectangular shape of the sushi pieces.
description_view_2: Rear angle showing the sushi pieces from behind, with the chopsticks and dish more prominently visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the sushi pieces' fish topping and the placement of the chopsticks and dish.
